{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032320094037C6F2AF53F8041D8E8C"}"},"total":79},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7318664695887971123","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，恐怖的氛围，感觉写的蛮到位的。情感描写也还可以。最容易犯错误的直播间，观众的评论，作者刻画的也超越了大多数文章。总的来说感觉是一款非常不错的规则怪谈文，希望作者继续加油！[送心][送心][送心]","text_exts":[{"e":77,"s":73,"text":"规则怪谈","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774267780041D8E8C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227318664695887971123%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227266359294319135802%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1704010833,"group_id":"7266359294319135802","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"请委婉发言","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nxz7x71TsBmT4Bq5MsQRMd4PqK9eRyF2nVzRFdvbAGt5","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/05949a2f9c3542f69211b0af611de845~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795066&x-signature=2Df%2FO0%2B8xy6NPdXOPtya5PKSQ5E%3D","user_id":"3417741732626024","user_name":"金毛吸面包鬼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3417741732626024","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7266359294319135802","book_info":{"abstract":"【国运+规则怪谈+悬疑解密+直播+系统+国运+往生堂堂主+古灵精怪胡桃】
2023，规则怪谈降临，太平洋中心，一座名为提瓦特的大陆拔地而起。
七天神像被腐蚀扭曲后，神秘的力量从各国召唤天选者，突破次元之壁降临大陆。一旦死亡，国运骤降。
白忱代表龙国，刚来大陆，竟然成为了胡桃？！
派蒙：胡桃姐姐！那个诡异不可以碰啦！
诡异：这该死的温柔，我竟然无法抵挡，哼，就今天当一次胡桃的狗吧o(~ヘ~o#)。
